message:
refactor(transport): Complete Mock→Sim rename across mod.rs and tests (bd-1z5u)

Follows up the mock.rs type rename with the remaining references:

mod.rs:
- Re-exports updated: MockTransportConfig → SimTransportConfig,
  MockChannelSink → SimChannelSink, MockNetwork → SimNetwork,
  mock_channel → sim_channel, etc.

tests.rs (112 lines changed):
- All test code updated to use Sim-prefixed types and sim_channel
  constructor throughout transport integration tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
